query: ("cool roof" OR "green roof" OR "living roof" OR "vegetated roof" OR "reflective roof" OR "white roof" OR "rooftop garden" OR "cool roofing" OR "green roofing" OR "roof intervention" OR "building intervention") AND ("urban heat island" OR UHI OR "surface temperature" OR "air temperature" OR "ambient temperature" OR "outdoor temperature" OR "environmental temperature" OR "heat exposure" OR "thermal environment" OR "heat stress" OR "heat-related" OR "temperature reduction" OR "cooling effect" OR mortality OR morbidity OR "health outcome" OR "temperature-health" OR "thermal comfort") AND (randomized OR experimental OR "quasi-experimental" OR "controlled trial" OR "intervention study" OR "natural experiment" OR "difference-in-difference" OR "instrumental variable" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "causal inference" OR "impact evaluation" OR "treatment effect" OR assignment OR allocation OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "counterfactual" OR "propensity score")
